name: Water Fondant
recipeInstructions:
Use this in recipes calling for prepared fondant and in chocolate-covered cherry recipes using prepared fondant. Also good to flavor and color many ways. Pure white when finished.
1. In a saucepan, combine all ingredients except vanilla.
2. Mix well; cover and cook for 3 minutes.
3. Remove the lid and continue cooking without stirring until the temperature reaches 240 degrees F (115°C).
4. Pour the fondant onto a cold surface immediately.
5. Cool to lukewarm (approximately 110 degrees F or 43°C).
6. Work with a spatula until white and creamy.
7. Knead with hands until smooth; add vanilla.
8. Knead until well blended.
9. Let stand, uncovered, until cold before using. Fondant may be kept for several weeks. Makes about 50 portions.
